'''Rif Taranu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who supported the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in his ship, ''[[Dead Reckoning]]'' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
